title: FIDES Issuer Catalog Schema
description: Schema for issuer catalog entries. Organization profile is defined in the FIDES organization catalog; this file references it via orgId.

orgId.description: Organization catalog id (e.g. org:animo). Must exist in https://github.com/FIDEScommunity/fides-organization-catalog — canonical name, DID, website, and logo come from there.

id.description: Format: issuer:<orgCode>:<issuerKey>:<environment> where environment is production or test (test = non-production: pilots, sandboxes, demos, QA).

displayName.description: Optional display name override (crawler uses .well-known display[] by default)

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this issuer

environment.description: production = live production issuance; test = all non-production instances (pilots, sandboxes, demos, internal QA). Use projectContext for finer detail.

issuanceProtocol.description: oid4vci = OpenID for Verifiable Credential Issuance (.well-known metadata); other = non-OID4VCI issuance (link credentials via credentialRefs only).

oid4vciMetadataUrl.description: Required when issuanceProtocol is oid4vci: URL to the OID4VCI .well-known/openid-credential-issuer metadata endpoint

issuerWebsiteUrl.description: Optional public URL for this issuer instance (e.g. issuer web UI, demo, or playground)

projectContext.description: Optional project or pilot context (e.g. 'EUDI Wallet LSP', 'EWC v3 pilot')

supportedWallets.description: Optional references to supported wallets in the wallet catalog

credentialRefs.description: Manual credential catalog references (fallback when auto-matching fails)
